payload.last_assistant_message:
A short next-step chooser usually works well after an explanatory response.

In many cases, options like do it now, show an example, or stop here are already enough.

judge_result.question: How should we make the follow-up after an explanatory response more concrete?

options.label: Add sample fixture
options.description: Create one more synthetic case where a chooser should appear after the explanation.

options.label: Refine decision rules
options.description: Tighten the rules for what next actions to show after an explanatory closeout.

options.label: Stop here
options.description: End with the current explanation only.

context_contains: A short next-step chooser usually works well after an explanatory response.
reason_contains: Do not ask the same or substantially similar chooser again
immediately continue in the same turn
Do not stop right after the `request_user_input` tool output
